title: In A Yellow Frame
content:
Her hand tinted to gold with henna
    Gave me a cup of wine like gold water,
    And I said: The moon rise, the sun rise.

    From the Arabic of Hefny-bey-Nassif (contemporary).
meaning:
"In A Yellow Frame" is a quintessential example of Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
